events.name: 2026 Tulip Festival!
events.time: Wed-Fri 12:00 PM-8:00 PM, Sat-Sun 10:00 AM-8:00 PM
events.location: DeBuck's Family Farm, 50240 Martz Road, Belleville, MI 48111
events.description: Publicly visible Facebook search snippets and the farm's official event page indicate DeBuck's 2026 Tulip Festival is running April 17-26 with 10 acres of tulips, photo spots, family attractions, and specialty food. Direct Facebook event page contents were not accessible from this environment.
